description: Baseline: prompt size benchmark plus autoresearch scaffolding for src/prompt.rs
Shorten prompt layers 0-9 by removing redundant headings/phrasing while preserving tested behavior and key operational directives
Further trim redundant wording in layers 0, 2, 3, 5, and 6 while preserving section structure and tested directives
Compact layers 1, 4, 7, 8, and 9 with wording-only reductions while preserving behavior and prompt tests
Shorten section separator to reduce prompt framing overhead and update benchmark to read the separator from source
Remove the no-active-skills placeholder line from layer 5 rendering to shave prompt overhead in both full and compact prompts
Condense high-volume wording in layers 5-7, especially layer 6 labels and repeated phrasing, while preserving tested directives and structure
Trim layer 0/1 formatting and small wording in layers 4, 8, and 9 while preserving prompt semantics and existing tests
Collapse layers 6 and 7 into compact labeled bullets to reduce prompt framing overhead without changing the decision policy
Collapse layer 5 into compact labeled bullets to reduce prompt framing and line overhead while preserving tested directives
